goal: A 4-agent hermes SDLC pipeline on wolf-i that autonomously covers the full delivery lifecycle for ric03uec/clawrium: issue sourcing → triage → code execution → GTM announcement. Triggered by a human orchestrator via Discord. One working end-to-end flow (TC-1 through TC-4) is the MVP.

clawrium-maurice.role: Sourcing / PM — monitors upstream repos, files GH issues on new features

clawrium-triage.role: Triage — labels issues, drafts plan, marks planned; adds agent-ready for xs/s complexity

clawrium-exec.role: Execution — one issue at a time, branch only, validate-before-PR, full test suite

clawrium-gtm.role: GTM — announces merged PRs to #announcements, updates CHANGELOG, blogs, daily digest

clawrium-maurice.contract: File issue only if (1) new upstream feature AND (2) not already tracked in ric03uec/clawrium. No approval gate.

clawrium-triage.contract: Assign agent-ready if complexity:xs or complexity:s. Do NOT assign agent-ready for m/l/xl or unknown complexity.

clawrium-exec.contract: Only pick issues with BOTH agent-ready AND planned AND complexity xs/s. One issue at a time. Always branch. validate skill confirms DoD before PR. Run full make test + make lint before PR.

clawrium-gtm.contract: Post to #announcements only. Update CHANGELOG [Unreleased] for user-visible changes. Draft blog posts. Daily digest of shipped work.

steps.what: SDLC architecture diagram and agent roles defined
SOUL.md written for each agent (.sdlc/<agent>/SOUL.md) — NEEDS REWRITE to 2,000 chars with full context
Custom skill specs written: sdlc-triage, sdlc-exec, sdlc-announce (.sdlc/<agent>/skills/) — NEEDS REWRITE per redesign
LABELS.md taxonomy written to repo root
9 missing labels created in repo (type:test, type:chore, area:*) — 42 labels total
Discord bot applications created: clawrium-triage (app 1513396227809476728), clawrium-gtm (app 1513396778165080064)
Discord channel records registered in clawctl: discord-clawrium-triage, discord-clawrium-exec, discord-clawrium-gtm
DISCORD_SETUP.md written for triage and gtm agents (.sdlc/<agent>/DISCORD_SETUP.md)
ATX security review passed (W1 secret migration, W2 gh auth, W3 comment disclosure all fixed)
PLAN.md and trace.json updated with redesigned skill assignments, triage contract, exec rules, GTM skill rename
clawrium-triage created, provider=clm-openrouter, Discord attached, started (ready)
clawrium-exec created, provider=clm-openrouter, Discord attached, started (ready)
clawrium-gtm created, provider=clm-openrouter, Discord attached, started (ready)
clawrium-maurice created, provider=clm-openrouter, Discord (discord-maurice) attached, started (ready)
Old 'maurice' agent deleted
Previous wrong skills detached: all 5 from clawrium-maurice (release-watcher, issue-triage, daily-digest, docs-sync, blog-author), issue-triage from clawrium-triage, docs-sync from clawrium-gtm
SOUL.md rewritten and pushed to all 4 agents (2,000 char limit: maurice=1641, triage=1681, exec=1937, gtm=1661). Pushed via clawctl agent memory edit --from-file.

9 custom skills written, installed into clawrium _skills/ bundled catalog, and attached to agents. Skills: upstream-hermes/zeroclaw/openclaw (maurice), sdlc-triage (triage), sdlc-exec+validate (exec), announcements+blog-author+daily-digest (gtm). All agents synced and ready.
steps.note: Skills delivered via bundled _skills/ in installed clawctl package (overlay not supported in installed v26.6.1). Source of truth remains .sdlc/<agent>/skills/. On clawctl upgrade, re-copy to new package path.

steps.what: Commit LABELS.md to repo and merge — triage agent reads it at runtime
steps.cmd: git add LABELS.md && git commit && gh pr create

steps.what: Delete clawrium-d01 (zeroclaw) — blocked: dbus-daemon PID 239583 requires sudo to kill on wolf-i
steps.cmd: ssh wolf-i 'sudo pkill -9 -u clawrium-d01 && sudo userdel -r clawrium-d01'; clawctl agent delete clawrium-d01 --yes

steps.what: Create test issue titled 'test: sdlc pipeline smoke TC-1' with labels: agent-created, type:test, complexity:xs, needs-triage
steps.pass: gh issue view <N> shows all 4 labels
steps.prompt: @clawrium-maurice Create a test issue titled 'test: sdlc pipeline smoke TC-1'. Labels: agent-created, type:test, complexity:xs, needs-triage.

steps.what: Triage issue #N: apply area label, remove needs-triage, add planned; add agent-ready (xs → allowed by contract), open PR with .itx/N/00_PLAN.md
steps.pass: planned label on issue, triage PR open, plan file not empty; agent-ready set (xs complexity)

steps.what: Merge triage PR. Confirm agent-ready label is set on issue #N (triage should have set it for xs).
Execute issue #N: branch exec/<N>-smoke, add one-liner to CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased], run make test, validate skill confirms DoD, open PR exec/<N>-smoke
steps.pass: PR open on GitHub, make test passes, PR links issue with Closes #N
steps.prompt: @clawrium-exec Execute issue #<N>. Add a one-liner to CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] as the implementation. Run make test. Open a PR.

steps.what: Review and merge exec PR #P.
Announce merged PR #P in #announcements. Update CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] if not already updated.
steps.pass: Discord message visible in #announcements, CHANGELOG updated
steps.prompt:
@clawrium-gtm PR #

was merged for issue #. Announce it.

steps.what: Add cron schedule to clawrium-triage: poll issues with needs-triage every 10 minutes
Add GitHub webhook or cron to trigger clawrium-gtm on PR merge (remove manual step)
Add cron schedule to clawrium-maurice: daily upstream monitoring runs
clawrium-maurice → GLM 5.1 (already available via clawrium-glm51 provider)
clawrium-triage → Kimi K2 (new provider needed)
clawrium-exec → Claude (new provider needed)
clawrium-gtm → Deepseek (new provider needed)

immediate_next_steps: P2.9 — Commit and merge LABELS.md (triage reads it at runtime)
P3/TC-1 — Run first smoke test step via Discord (all agents ready)
